summary: Backend Engineer with 2+ years of experience building scalable backend systems, real-time APIs, and AI-powered applications using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and AWS. Experienced in async architectures, microservices, streaming systems, and performance optimization for production workloads. Built production LLM and agentic AI systems with real-time analytics at scale.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
highlights: Built production LLM-powered AI code assistance feature using OpenAI APIs with optimized prompt engineering, token management, and SSE streaming, serving real-time code suggestions to students.
Architected full-stack learning platform with React + FastAPI/Node.js, integrating AI-driven feedback loops for student code submissions.
Optimized PostgreSQL and MongoDB queries through indexing and query restructuring, reducing average API response time by 35%.
Implemented frontend state management with Redux and React Router for responsive, low-latency AI interactions across the platform.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer 1 (SD1)
highlights: Built scalable async FastAPI and Flask microservices for real-time synchronization and low-latency concurrent collaboration.
Designed production-grade MySQL schemas and integrated third-party APIs for scalable backend workloads.
Developed modular reusable backend services, accelerating feature delivery across multiple systems.

experience.title: Software Developer Intern
highlights: Built reusable AWS cloud component and modular Python data-processing solutions with optimized SQL queries, improving pipeline scalability and data integrity.

projects.name: AI Fitness Coach
highlights: Built scalable backend architecture for an agentic AI fitness platform using LangGraph and FastAPI with 8 integrated domain-specific tools.
Implemented parallelized context-loading pipelines with Mem0 and pgvector, reducing first-token latency by 40%.
Developed real-time SSE streaming and server-side rate limiting for low-latency AI interactions across the mobile app.

projects.name: MindSnack Quiz Builder
highlights: Built scalable quiz and survey backend system with JSON-driven workflows enabling rapid no-code quiz configuration and A/B testing.
Developed Node.js/Express APIs with Prisma ORM, JWT authentication, analytics tracking, and payment lead management.
Engineered backend analytics pipelines tracking 10+ conversion events per user for funnel analysis and ad retargeting.

projects.name: AI Code Editor
highlights: Built low-latency backend services for AI-powered code suggestions, debugging, and contextual completions using FastAPI and LLM APIs.
Optimized prompt-processing pipelines and caching strategies, reducing token usage per request by 30%.
